th
20. O Brahmin, if Guru is in the 12 from Lagn Pad, receiving a Drishti from
others, the expenses will be through taxes and on the person himself.
th
21. O Brahmin, if Śani is in the 12 from Lagn Pad along with Mangal and
receives a Drishti from others, the expenses will be through one‟s co-born.
22. Gainful Sources. Whatever sources of expenses are indicated above
th
with reference to the 12 from Lagn Pad, gains through similar sources will
occur, if Labh Bhava so features with reference to Lagn Pad.
th
23. The 7 Bhava from Pad (up to Sloka 27). If Rahu, or Ketu is placed in
th
the 7 from Lagn Pad, the native will be troubled by disorders of the
stomach, or by fire.
th
24. Should there be Ketu in the 7 from Lagn Pad, receiving a Drishti from,
or being yuti with another malefic, the native will be adventurous, will have
(prematurely) grey hair and a big male organ.
th
25.
